summary: Per-drive scan tabs, responsive polled progress, incremental folder caching, and real app names in menu bar system status.
introduced: Per-drive tabs: Scanning, Results, Recommendations, and AI Analysis replace the single overview during scans
Copyable tail -f command on the Scanning tab for verbose scanner logs in Terminal (log path display removed)
folder_scan_cache SQLite table stores folder timestamps so rescans skip unchanged directories
Menu bar System Status shows application names for top CPU and memory processes with … truncation for long names
changed: Scan progress updates via periodic polling of status files and log tails instead of realtime MainActor callbacks
Results tab opens automatically when scanning and analysis complete, with a View Results button on the Scanning tab
Tiered and folder scans reuse cached index rows when directory modification timestamps match the previous scan
Toolbar simplified to Disk, Maintenance, and Duplicates — Ask DiskWise moved into the per-drive AI Analysis tab
fixed: Long scans no longer beach-ball the main UI from mid-scan storage overview refreshes every few thousand files
